name: Honey Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together the softened butter, sugar, and honey until light and fluffy.
2. In a small bowl, combine the flour, ground ginger, and baking powder; mix in with the mixer on low speed until blended well into the butter mixture.
3. Flatten the dough to a disk shape and refrigerate, wrapped in plastic, for 1 hour until firm.
4. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
5. Work with half of the dough at a time; keep the remainder refrigerated.
6. Mold the remaining dough into shapes or press them into pans, or roll out to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm) between two sheets of waxed paper and cut into desired shapes.
7. Place the cookies on ungreased cookie sheets about 1 inch apart.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes, according to size and thickness of cookies, until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks before storing in an airtight container.
